subject: [SO] Bump container versions,
commit_message:
[SO] Bump container versions,

On top of CNF revert

Testing the gating results 1.7.6-20201104T1348 staging for the time being
Bump some containers to 1.7.7 ( released Oct 28th 2020 )

so-bpmn-infra: 1.7.7
so-catalog-db-adapter: 1.7.7
so-monitoring: 1.7.7
so/nssmf-adapter: 1.7.7
so/openstack-adapter: 1.7.7
so/request-db-adapter: 1.7.7
so/sdc-controller: 1.7.7
so/sdnc-adapter: 1.7.7
so/vnfm-adapter:1.7.7
so/api-handler-infra:1.7.7

Issue-ID: SO-3216
Signed-off-by: Sylvain Desbureaux <sylvain.desbureaux@orange.com>
Change-Id: If986fe498611dc7c90df2932572472658d56a013
